steps.title: Set up the tangent ratio
steps.content:
For the ramp angle, tangent is opposite over adjacent. The height is $22.7$ inches and the horizontal distance is $x$, so
$$\tan t=\frac{22.7}{x}$$

steps.title: Apply the legal limit
steps.content:
The ramp must satisfy the tangent limit, so
$$\frac{22.7}{x}\leq\frac{1}{12}$$

steps.title: Find the least distance
steps.content:
Since $x>0$, multiply both sides by $12x$.
$$12(22.7)\leq x$$
$$272.4\leq x$$
The least possible value is the boundary value. The answer is 272.4.
